name: Covetrus Veterinary Platform API
what_it_does: Covetrus Veterinary Platform REST API for veterinary pharmacy, supply chain, and practice management software integration. Enables AI agents to manage veterinary prescription and online pharmacy fulfillment for animal health medication access, handle veterinary supply and drug inventory management for practice supply chain optimization, access veterinary practice management data integration for clinical-pharmacy workflow connectivity, retrieve patient refill request and prescription management for automated refill workflow, manage client communication and reminder automation for preventive care and medication adherence, handle controlled substance dispensing and DEA log integration for veterinary pharmacy compliance, access compounding pharmacy integration for custom veterinary formulation management, retrieve practice analytics and pharmaceutical spend reporting for veterinary business management, manage veterinary hospital group purchasing and formulary management for DSO operations, and integrate Covetrus with IDEXX, ezyVet, AVImark, and Cornerstone PIMS platforms.
use_cases: Fulfilling prescription refills from veterinary pharmacy agents
Managing drug inventory from supply chain agents
Automating medication reminders from client engagement agents
Tracking controlled substance dispensing from compliance agents
not_for: Veterinary practices using compounding pharmacy only
Non-veterinary animal agriculture without companion animal focus
best_when: A veterinary practice, corporate veterinary group, or veterinary hospital using Covetrus wants AI agents to automate pharmacy fulfillment, drug inventory management, controlled substance logging, and client medication adherence.
avoid_when: DEA CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE RISK: Covetrus handles veterinary controlled drug dispensing — automated prescription processing for Schedule II-V drugs must comply with DEA veterinary dispensing regulations; automated dispensing without valid prescription or VCPR creates DEA enforcement risk. VCPR prescription requirement — automated refill processing requires valid Veterinary-Client-Patient Relationship; automated refills without recent veterinarian examination violates state veterinary practice acts. State pharmacy board regulations — veterinary online pharmacies are regulated by state pharmacy boards; automated dispensing must comply with state-specific veterinary pharmacy licensing requirements that vary significantly.

auth.notes: Covetrus uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON for partner integrations. Limited public developer documentation. Portland, Maine HQ. Founded 2019 (merger of Henry Schein Animal Health and Vets First Choice). Private (Clayton, Dubilier & Rice, 2023 buyout). 100,000+ veterinary practices globally. Veterinary supply, pharmacy, and software market. Competes with IDEXX, MWI Veterinary Supply (AmerisourceBergen), and Patterson Veterinary.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-transaction and annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-prescription transaction fee; enterprise DSO contract pricing
pricing.notes: Portland, ME. Founded 2019. CD&R-backed (private 2023). 100,000+ veterinary practices globally. Veterinary supply and pharmacy market. Competes with IDEXX and Patterson Vet.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per partner integration

known_agent_gotchas: DEA CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE COMPLIANCE: Automated veterinary controlled drug refill processing must verify valid prescription and DEA compliance for Schedule II-V drugs; automated dispensing without valid Rx creates DEA regulatory risk and potential criminal liability

VCPR refill requirement — automated prescription refill for veterinary medications requires valid VCPR; automated refills beyond VCPR validity (varies by state, typically 1 year) violates state veterinary practice acts

State pharmacy board licensing — veterinary online pharmacy operations are regulated by state boards of pharmacy; state-specific veterinary pharmacy dispensing rules vary significantly; automated dispensing must implement state-specific validation

Compounding pharmacy regulation — automated compounding pharmacy orders are subject to USP 797/503A/503B requirements; compounded veterinary products have specific labeling, dispensing, and documentation requirements

PIMS integration variability — Covetrus integrates with multiple PIMS (Cornerstone, AVImark, ezyVet); integration depth and API capability varies by PIMS partner; verify specific PIMS integration scope before automation
No webhooks — prescription status and fulfillment event notification requires polling; no native event push for prescription status changes or delivery events
agent_readiness.security_notes: Veterinary pharmacy and supply. SOC2. OAuth2. US/CA/EU. Veterinary prescription and controlled substance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Veterinary pharmacy. SOC2. OAuth2. US/CA/EU. Veterinary prescription and controlled substance data.
